name: vizeer
documentation:
Vizeer

A video contact sheet generator

Vizeer A video contact sheet generator ## 🚀 Features ## Installation ``` pip install vizeer ``` ## Usage ``` vizeer sample.mkv -o sample.png ``` ## 🧑‍💻 Contributing Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request. ## 📄 License This project is licensed under the MIT License. See the LICENSE file for more details.

functions.name: vizeer.utils.get_video_info
documentation:
Extract media information from video file.

Args:
    video_path: Path to the video file.

Returns:
    Dictionary containing video metadata.

Raises:
    ValueError: If video track cannot be found in the file.

functions.name: vizeer.utils.format_timestamp
documentation:
Format seconds into HH:MM:SS.

Args:
    seconds: Number of seconds to format.

Returns:
    Formatted timestamp string.

functions.name: vizeer.utils.parse_color
documentation:
Parse color string into RGB tuple.

Args:
    color: Color string in format 'rgb(r,g,b)' or predefined color name.

Returns:
    Tuple of (r, g, b) values.

Raises:
    ValueError: If color string is invalid.

functions.name: vizeer.scene.detect_scenes
documentation:
Detect scene changes in video using frame differences with OpenCV.

Args:
    video_path: Path to the video file to analyze.
    min_scene_length: Minimum duration (in seconds) between detected scenes.

Returns:
    List of timestamps (in seconds) where scene changes were detected.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the video file cannot be opened.

functions.name: vizeer.scene.select_representative_frames
documentation:
Select representative timestamps from detected scenes.

Args:
    scene_timestamps: List of timestamps (in seconds) where scenes change.
    num_screenshots: Number of screenshots to select.
    video_duration: Total duration of the video (in seconds).

Returns:
    List of timestamps selected for screenshots.

functions.name: vizeer.scene.extract_frame_at_time
documentation:
Extract a frame from the video at a specific timestamp.

Args:
    video_path: Path to the video file.
    timestamp: Timestamp (in seconds) to extract the frame.

Returns:
    The extracted frame as a NumPy array.

classes.name: vizeer.types.VideoInfo
documentation: Type definitions for video information dictionary.

functions.name: vizeer.cli.main
documentation:
Create a contact sheet from video screenshots with smart scene detection.

Examples:
    # Basic usage with white background
    $ vizeer video.mp4

    # Custom background color
    $ vizeer video.mp4 --bg-color rgb(50,50,50)

    # Black background with more screenshots
    $ vizeer video.mp4 --bg-color black -n 9

classes.name: vizeer.core.Generator

methods.name: vizeer.core.Generator.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the contact sheet generator.

Args:
    video_path: Path to the video file to process.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the video file cannot be accessed.

methods.name: vizeer.core.Generator.create_sheet
documentation:
Create a contact sheet from video screenshots.

Args:
    num_screenshots: Number of screenshots to include in the sheet.
    output_path: Path where the output image will be saved.
    min_scene_length: Minimum frames between detected scenes.
    bg_color: Background color for the contact sheet.
             Can be 'white', 'black', 'gray' or 'rgb(r,g,b)'.

Returns:
    Path to the generated contact sheet image.

Raises:
    ValueError: If the video cannot be processed or invalid color.

methods.name: vizeer.core.Generator._create_header_text
documentation:
Create the header text with video information.

Args:
    num_scenes: Number of detected scenes in the video.

Returns:
    Formatted header text string.

Generate contact sheets from video files with scene detection.

This class handles the creation of contact sheets from videos, including
scene detection, frame selection, and layout generation.

Attributes:
    video_path: Path to the source video file.
    info: Dictionary containing video metadata.
